name: audit basic host
prompt: Check whether this Ubuntu 24.04 workstation is ready for OCUDU build work before I clone anything.

name: audit portable linux
prompt: Give me a non-destructive Linux readiness report for srsRAN prerequisites on a portable host.

name: audit with network view
prompt: Inspect this gaming PC for OCUDU prerequisites and include interface visibility in the report.

name: host audit strict
prompt: Run a strict host audit for OCUDU and fail if recommended Ubuntu packages are missing.

name: not build install
prompt: Clone srsRAN Project and build it in .local/ocudu right now.

name: not smoke test
prompt: Run local smoke tests against the build directory and check gnb --help.

name: not packaging
prompt: Review these scratch files and promote the reusable ones into a tracked skill.

name: not rf claim
prompt: Validate RU interoperability and prove carrier-grade conformance on this host alone.
notes: Out of scope for the host audit skill.
